features: Christmas Artificial Holly Berries: Package includes 100pcs Fake Berries with Wire Stems, looks so adorable and beautiful, just like real holly berries. Exquisitely compact design, you can also use it to decorate mini items.

Artificial Holly Berry Stems: These holly berries are made of foam ball and bendable floral stem wire.The surface is covered with glitter powder that makes it look shining and vivid.Small berries are nice for gift embellishments or holiday craft projects.

Natural and lifelike: with vivid color and realistic looking, these fake berry stems picks give you a sense of natural beauty and a good mood, the artificial holly berries pick can well satisfy your pursuit of beauty and decorative needs
Apply as Christmas decorations: these artificial holly berries are good for Christmas decorations, Christmas tree ornaments, you can twist round garlands or branches on Christmas tree

Total length: approx.6.5 cm/ 2.6 inch; Berry diameter: 1 cm/ 0.39 inch; Small artificial berries look like real holly berries, great for DIY home, hotel, bar, cafe, and office furnishing articles, etc.
